name: 聖旨宣讀（命運裁決）
description: 通過正式聖旨宣讀來改變人物命運，具有不可抗拒的權威感。從開場的廢后聖旨到結尾的封后聖旨，形成完美呼應。
tags: 莊嚴的儀式感、跪地接旨的畫面、眾人的反應鏡頭

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: The Empress Laura Lake is hereby stripped of her title, administered a sterility elixir, and confined to the cold palace for reflection... She is hereby appointed as the empress of the central palace.
examples.context: 莊嚴的儀式感、跪地接旨的畫面、眾人的反應鏡頭
